title: PM Modi in UAE: From boosting strategic petroleum reserves to deepening defence, big outcomes of visit
description: During Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s UAE visit, New Delhi and Abu Dhabi signed multiple Memorandums of Understanding. These include boosting India’s strategic petroleum reserves, ensuring LPG supply, deepening the defence partnership, setting up a ship repair hub, and investment in finance and artificial intelligence (AI)
content:
Prime Minister Narendra Modi has wrapped up his visit to the UAE. The visit comes in the backdrop of the crisis in West Asia and amid the Centre hiking petrol and diesel prices after a two-year gap.

title: Swanand Kirkire fears for the soul of Bollywood music
description: Swanand Kirkire, a renowned actor-singer, reflects on the changing landscape of the film industry after the COVID-19 pandemic. He discusses the struggle to create original content in Mumbai and the growing role of artificial intelligence in entertainment. While AI has not yet reached a level to create emotional songs like “O Ri Chiraiya.”

title: Trump says he discussed AI guardrails, Nvidia’s chips with Xi
description: US President Donald Trump said he discussed guardrails on artificial intelligence with Chinese leader Xi Jinping, while adding that Nvidia Corp.'s H200 chips also came up during a two-day summit in Beijing.
content:
By Michael Shepard, Bloomberg

title: Ford Falls Most in 15 Months After AI
description: Ford Motor Co.’s blistering rally screeched to a halt Friday, as a broader market selloff cooled enthusiasm over the automaker’s potential to benefit from the boom in energy demand for artificial intelligence.

title: Shares drop as oil prices rattle
description: The U.S. stock market is falling from its records Friday and joining a worldwide drop for stocks, as higher oil prices send a shiver through the bond market. Stocks that had been caught up in the euphoria around artificial-intelligence technology led the way lower.
